PAGE_TITLE: WordPress Comments Plugin - Live, Private & Spam-Free | FastComments
META_DESCRIPTION: Replace slow, ad-filled WordPress comments with FastComments. Real-time comments served from a global CDN to take the load off your server, sign-in with your existing WordPress accounts, spam protection, and one-click Disqus import. Free trial.
HEAD_KEYWORDS: wordpress comments plugin, wordpress commenting system, fastcomments wordpress, disqus alternative wordpress, wordpress live comments, replace wordpress comments, wpdiscuz alternative, jetpack comments alternative
SPIDER_SUBTITLE: A complete replacement for WordPress, Disqus, Jetpack, and wpDiscuz comments - with none of the ads or data harvesting.
OFFLOAD_TITLE: Take the Load Off Your Server
OFFLOAD_SUBTITLE: A big reason sites switch: FastComments hosts and serves every comment from its own global infrastructure, so your WordPress server stays fast - even when a post takes off.
OFFLOAD_CDN_DESCRIPTION: Comments load from FastComments' global CDN instead of querying your WordPress database on every page view. Your server does less work and your pages stay quick.
OFFLOAD_SCALE_DESCRIPTION: From 100 comments to 100,000, FastComments handles storage, moderation, and real-time delivery - with no extra database load and no slowdowns during traffic spikes.
OFFLOAD_SYNC_DESCRIPTION: Want a local copy? Optionally sync your comments into your WordPress database - continuously, or as a one-time export - so you always have your data and can cancel without losing a thing.
SSO_SUBTITLE: Pick how readers sign in - keep it frictionless, or let them use the WordPress account they already have.
SSO_SECURE_DESCRIPTION: Readers start commenting instantly - no account required. This is how FastComments ships, and it drives the most participation.
SSO_SECURE_FEATURE_1: Comment with just a name and email
SSO_SIMPLE_DESCRIPTION: Turn on Single Sign-On so your members comment with the WordPress account they already have - no second registration.
HOW_IT_WORKS_TITLE: Set Up in a Few Clicks
HOW_IT_WORKS_SUBTITLE: Install the plugin and follow the setup wizard - no code, and no API keys to copy.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Add FastComments from the WordPress plugin directory and activate it. There is nothing to code.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: The setup wizard links WordPress to FastComments in a couple of clicks. Create a free account or connect an existing one, and choose whether your data lives globally or in the EU.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: FastComments imports your existing comments and takes over commenting on your posts - hosted on our infrastructure so your WordPress server stays fast. Prefer a local copy? Optionally sync comments back to WordPress anytime.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SERVER_LOAD: Will this reduce load on my WordPress server?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SERVER_LOAD_ANSWER: Yes - that's one of the main reasons sites switch. FastComments stores and serves comments from its own global infrastructure, so your WordPress server no longer queries the database and renders comment threads on every page view. The widget loads asynchronously from a CDN, which is especially valuable on high-traffic posts.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_MIGRATE: Can I import my existing WordPress or Disqus comments?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_MIGRATE_ANSWER: Yes. The setup wizard includes a one-click import that brings over your existing WordPress comments - including nested threads, author information, and timestamps. Imports from Disqus, Hyvor, and other systems are supported too, and avatars and images migrate automatically.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_KEEP_DATA: Do I still own my comments?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_KEEP_DATA_ANSWER: Always. FastComments hosts your comments so they don't weigh down your server, and you can optionally sync them back into your WordPress database - continuously, or as a one-time export before you cancel. Nothing is ever locked away.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SEO: Will switching to FastComments affect my SEO?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_SEO_ANSWER: No. FastComments renders comments server-side - even without JavaScript - so search engines can still crawl and index your comment content. You can also optionally sync comments into your WordPress database if you want a local copy as well.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_FREE_TRIAL_ANSWER: Yes. Start a free trial with full access to every feature - no credit card required. After that, pricing is based on your monthly page views and starts well under $5/month for most sites, with no per-comment fees.
FAQ_WORDPRESS_GDPR: Is FastComments private and GDPR compliant?
FAQ_WORDPRESS_GDPR_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments never shows ads, never harvests or sells visitor data, and sets only the functional cookies needed for login - so no cookie banner is required for FastComments specifically. Keep all of your data in the EU on eu.fastcomments.com, and a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available on request.
FINAL_CTA_TITLE: Ready to Upgrade Your WordPress Comments?
FINAL_CTA_DESCRIPTION: Install the plugin, connect your account, and go live in minutes. Faster pages, zero ads, zero data harvesting, and none of the server load of native WordPress comments.
